action.reasoning: Observation: Starting from scratch. Analysis: Need to build a baseline Deep Knowledge Tracing (DKT) model using an LSTM. I will implement model.py, train.py, and predict.py. I will train for 5 epochs to establish a baseline score and measure the iteration time. Decision: Write the code and run the training script, then submit for evaluation.
